title: hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsicrinum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsicrinum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsicrinum include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be infused in hot water to make a tea, or dried and used in tinctures and capsules to promote overall well-being.
